# Canonical secret-shape fixture for the audit redactor.
#
# Each non-blank, non-comment line has the form:
#
#     <category>	<plaintext>
#
# (tab-separated). The test in redact_patterns_test.go feeds every line
# through audit.Redact and asserts the plaintext does NOT survive.
#
# Add a new line here BEFORE adding a new regex in redact.go — the test
# is the contract that locks the regex in place. Remove a line ONLY
# when its category is no longer something we need to keep out of
# audit_records.params_redacted.
#
# Whitespace policy: a single tab between category and plaintext. Don't
# add trailing whitespace; the parser strips it but lint will complain.
#
# Categories are free-form labels — they exist for failure-message
# clarity only and have no semantic meaning to the test runner.

openai_sk_proj	sk<join>-proj<join>-abcdefghij1234567890abcdefghij1234567890abcd
openai_sk_classic	sk<join>-ABCDefGHIjklMNOPqrstUVWXyz12345678
anthropic_sk_ant	sk<join>-ant<join>-api03-aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789aBcDeFgH
github_pat_classic	ghp<join>_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789
github_pat_fine_grained	github<join>_pat_11AAAAAAA0aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789abcdefghij
github_oauth_user	ghu<join>_16C7e42F292c6912E7710c838347Ae178B4a
github_oauth_server	ghs<join>_16C7e42F292c6912E7710c838347Ae178B4a
github_oauth_refresh	ghr<join>_16C7e42F292c6912E7710c838347Ae178B4a
github_oauth_app	gho<join>_16C7e42F292c6912E7710c838347Ae178B4a
stripe_sk_test	sk<join>_test<join>_4eC39HqLyjWDarjtT1zdp7dc1234567890
stripe_sk_live	sk<join>_live<join>_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789
stripe_rk_test	rk<join>_test<join>_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789
gitlab_pat	glpat<join>-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
aws_access_key	AKIA<join>IOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
aws_sts_temp_key	ASIA<join>IOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
google_api_key	AIza<join>SyB1234567890abcdefghij1234567890abcde
slack_bot_token	xoxb<join>-12345-67890-aBcDeFgHiJkLmN
slack_webhook_url	https://hooks.slack.com<join>/services/T01ABCDEF/B01ABCDEF/aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwX
bearer_jwt_header	Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0.signature_part_long_enough
bearer_opaque	Bearer abcdef0123456789ABCDEF
generic_sk_multisegment	sk-live-container-secret-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz
jwt_standalone	eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0.signature_part_long_enough
authorization_header	Authorization: Token deadbeef1234567890abcdef
telegram_bot_token	INVALID_TELEGRAM_TEST_TOKEN_DO_NOT_USE
private_key_pem	-----BEGIN<join> RSA PRIVATE KEY-----\nMIIEowIBAAKCAQEA0...redacted...wIDAQAB\n-----END<join> RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
